title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 359.271 - Voting rights of general partners
text:
359.271.  Voting rights of general partners. — The partnership agreement may grant to all or certain identified general partners the right to vote (on a per capita or any other basis), separately or with all or any class of the limited partners, on any matter.
(L. 1985 H.B. 512 & 650) 
Effective 1-01-87
